description: Permanent park on all Anthropic-related work per Ken Mun 2026-06-12 08:12. Active until Ken explicitly unparks with future instruction.
ken_directive_verbatim: Anthropic credits and model enablement - Permanently park until I provide future instruction and update

parked: Anthropic credits balance monitoring (auto-heal CHECK 9 — but this is still active as a normal cost check, not a parked work item)
Anthropic model enablement in any agent primary or fallback chain
TKT-0241 Sonnet Review Tier (was ungated from CLAUDE RESTORE per CHG-0500, now parked again)
Anthropic tier assignment in any agent
Updates to globalAllowedModels that add new Anthropic variants
Any model swap that includes anthropic/* as primary or fallback
not_parked: Anthropic models staying in globalAllowedModels (documented as an option, just not active)
The higherQuality tier existence in model-policy.json (inactive, agentIds=[])
Historical CHG records (CHG-0349, CHG-0500) — they are immutable audit trail
Documentation that references Anthropic as an option in the future state
Auto-heal CHECK 9 running normally — it's a cost-balance check, not a parked work item

unblocking.keyword_required: Ken must explicitly say 'CLAUDE ACTIVATE' or provide specific instruction
unblocking.what_unblocks: Anthropic key rotation, higherQuality tier activation, model enablement, TKT-0241
unblocking.what_still_needs_chg: Any Anthropic enablement needs a new CHG record and Ken approval (per CREST v1.3 risk framework post CHG-0500)

monitoring.alerts: NONE. No cron or heartbeat will alert about Anthropic work being unstarted or pending.
monitoring.reminders: NONE. No auto-reminders. This park is by-design permanent until Ken unparks.

related_artifacts.runbook_section: docs/YODA_RUNBOOK.md — CLAUDE RECONFIGURE (CHG-0500) section, plus this park
